title: Knabbiiicraft 7
body:
![Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35184643104f286a179a72ade8beec09a7071c78.png)

# Knabbiiicraft 7 This is the official Modpack of Knabbiiicraft 7! ## 📖 What is this Modpack for? Are you looking for a good Vanilla+ modpack that not only boosts your performance but also improves your experience on Survival servers? This modpack makes everything feel just a little bit better. With the ability to fully customize your game to change its look and improve your FPS, you can take care of your PC and finally play smoother. And with the cool tweaks that make many things easier, things like crafting and exploring are even more fun! ## Info **Feel free to disable client side mods at will or due to errors or game crashes that may occur.** This Modpack is using Ressourcepacks from: [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
